alternatives.name: Co-located BESS (EPC-delivered)
alternatives.tradeoffs: LFP cycle fade, €250–400/kWh, 40–80 m²/MWh footprint, 6–12 mo cert lead, fire-risk envelope

alternatives.name: Standalone grid-booster BESS (park-adjacent)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Same tech stack; different grid-connection and commercial model

alternatives.name: Synchronous condenser / flywheel
alternatives.tradeoffs: Inertia-only — no energy arbitrage, no curtailment capture, rotating-mass O&M

alternatives.name: P2X / electrolyzer offtake (curtailment sink)
alternatives.tradeoffs: H2 safety regime, needs offtaker, €/MW CAPEX 2–3× BESS, long ramp

alternatives.name: Do nothing / accept curtailment
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero CAPEX; leaves ~€400 k/MW/yr revenue stack unclaimed
